statement: Lambda GPU Cloud lists on-demand per-GPU hourly rental rates for Nvidia GPUs, e.g. H100 SXM at $3.99/hr on an 8x instance, a static price level with no stated baseline or change.
why: Records the prevailing Nvidia GPU cloud rental price level as a daily display overlay; no baseline or change is stated, so it does not indicate demand or supply direction.

impact.mechanism: On-demand rental price level for Nvidia GPUs at a neocloud; display overlay only, auto-excluded from the index and not a demand/supply signal.

confidence.basis: Vendor's own pricing page (secondary tier); no as-of date stated, price level only.

dispersion: Per-GPU-hr rates span from Quadro RTX 6000 at $0.69/hr to B200 SXM6 at $6.99/hr (1x) across the listed instances.
